title: Rust/Zephyr: Missing GPSR geographic forwarding (spec 9.7)
description: Python Router.gpsr_forward() uses haversine distance to select neighbor closest to destination. Neither Rust nor Zephyr implement GPSR. Reference: python/src/lichen/routing/router.py gpsr_forward()
close_reason:
Implemented GPSR geographic forwarding in Rust and Zephyr/C:

Rust (lichen-node/src/routing.rs):
- Added GeoCoords type and coords field to Neighbor struct
- Added node_coords to Router with set/clear methods
- Implemented gpsr_forward() with haversine distance
- Added is_valid_coords() for NaN/inf/null-island/range validation
- Added 17 tests covering all edge cases

C (lichen/subsys/lichen/routing/router.c):
- Implemented lichen_router_gpsr_forward() with approximate distance calculation
- Added is_valid_coords_e7() for coordinate validation
- Uses gradient table entries with coords for neighbor lookup
- Created test suite in lichen/tests/routing_gpsr/ with 8 test cases

Both implementations match Python reference (python/src/lichen/routing/router.py gpsr_forward()) behavior.
